flashcards.front: What is the Ordinary Generating Function (OGF) for a sequence {a_n}?
What is the generating function for the constant sequence 1, 1, 1, 1, ...?
What is the generating function for the geometric sequence 1, c, c², c³, ...?
What does multiplying a generating function G(x) by x accomplish for the underlying sequence?
flashcards.back: It shifts the sequence to the right. The new sequence is {0, a_0, a_1, a_2, ...}.

flashcards.front: What is the final, crucial step after solving for the closed-form of the generating function G(x)?
flashcards.back: Find the power series expansion of G(x). The coefficient of x^n in this expansion is the closed-form solution a_n to the recurrence.
